scenario.name: Rohan
scenario.key_situation: Just exploring, parents not aware he called

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah se. Aapne humari website pe inquiry ki thi. Kaise hai aap?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hello... haan main Rohan hun. Actually main bas dekh raha tha online courses ke baare mein.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great Rohan! Aap kahan se ho aur currently kis class mein ho?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Main Kanpur se hun aur class 10th mein hun. Abhi boards bhi aane wale hain.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Accha Kanpur se! Boards ke saath saath kya aap competitive exams ki bhi preparation soch rahe ho? JEE ya NEET?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan bhaiya, main JEE ki taiyari karna chahta hun. Engineering mein interest hai. Par abhi toh bas explore kar raha hun options.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's excellent Rohan! JEE ki preparation 10th ke baad start karna bahut smart decision hai. Aapke ghar mein parents ko pata hai aapne call ki hai?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Actually nahi... main bas dekh raha tha ki kya options hain. Parents ko abhi bataya nahi hai. Pehle main samajhna chahta hun.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul sahi approach hai! Pehle research kar lena chahiye. Batao, currently aap koi coaching join ki hai ya self-study kar rahe ho?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Abhi toh school ki padhai focus mein hai. Coaching ke liye socha hai but Kanpur mein ache institutes thode expensive hain.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan, traditional coaching ka cost definitely high hota hai. PhysicsWallah mein hum quality education affordable mein provide karte hain. JEE Main ka target hai na aapka?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan JEE Main. Advanced ka nahi pata, pehle Main clear kar lun. Aapke courses kitne ka hota hai? Zyada expensive toh nahi?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Dekho Rohan, humara Lakshya batch jo class 11th-12th ke liye hai, wo sirf Rs. 3999 for 2 years. Traditional coaching mein toh monthly 5000+ lagta hai!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Wow, that's quite reasonable! Par quality kaisi hai? Maine suna hai Alakh sir acche padhate hain.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely! Alakh sir personally Physics padhate hain, and we have experienced faculty for Chemistry aur Maths bhi. 50+ lakh students trust karte hain PW ko.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Sounds good. Par main abhi 10th mein hun, toh kya 11th start hone ka wait karna chahiye?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Actually Rohan, humara Foundation course hai 10th ke students ke liye - 'Udaan'. It helps in smooth transition from 10th to 11th aur JEE preparation.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm interesting. But honestly, mujhe parents se discuss karna padega budget ke liye. They handle all financial decisions.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul Rohan, that's very responsible of you. Parents ke saath discuss karna important hai. Kya main aapko course details WhatsApp pe send kar dun?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan that would be helpful. But abhi commitment nahi kar sakta. Pehle ghar mein baat karni hai ki budget kya hai coaching ke liye.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: No pressure at all! Main aapko complete information send karunga. Aap parents ke saath discuss kar lena. Koi questions ho toh call kar sakte ho.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you Priya. Aap helpful ho. Main details dekhunga aur parents se baat karunga. Maybe kuch weeks mein clear picture hoga.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect Rohan! Take your time. Education investment mein rush nahi karna chahiye. Main aapko study tips aur free resources bhi share karunga meanwhile.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That's great! Free resources help karega 10th boards ke liye bhi. Thank you for being so understanding.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Anytime Rohan! Boards mein best of luck. Aur remember, JEE preparation mein consistency is key. Feel free to reach out whenever ready. Take care!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you so much Priya! Will definitely keep in touch. Bye!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bye Rohan! All the best for your boards aur future planning. Stay connected!
